documents.content: Mani is a software developer and the creator of this bot.
Mani enjoys coding, AI, and building cool projects.
Mani's weekday schedule: 7 AM to 8 AM Gym, 9 AM to 7 PM Office, 7 PM to 10 PM Dinner or hanging out with friends, 10 PM to 6 AM Sleep.
Mani's weekend schedule: Sleeping in the morning, eating, coding, and hanging out with friends.
